title: indurgia coromandeliana
intro: Indurgia coromandeliana, also known as the Indian coral tree or coral tree, is a flowering plant native to India and Sri Lanka. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Indurgia coromandeliana include its ability to treat skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and dermatitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, powders, and tinctures that can be used to make teas, ointments, and creams for topical application.
